# STL Shelf

> STL Shelf is a software designed to organize, catalog, version, and manage private 3D printing model libraries. It is STL file management software, private 3D model library software, and open-source 3D model library software. STL Shelf helps users manage STL, 3MF, OBJ, and PLY files with tags, version history, and browser preview. It is not a marketplace, not a social platform, and not an import/sync hub.

Use the hosted version managed by us for the simplest path. Self-hosting is available because STL Shelf is open source.

Markdown mirrors are available by appending `.md` to page URLs. The homepage mirror is `/index.html.md`.

## Best starting points
- [Homepage](https://stl-shelf.com/index.html.md): Product summary, category definition, and core internal links.
- [Guides hub](https://stl-shelf.com/guides.md): Main content index for pillar pages, guides, comparisons, and open-source pages.
- [FAQs](https://stl-shelf.com/faqs.md): High-intent FAQ content for search snippets and LLM extraction.

## Primary intent pages
- [STL file management software](https://stl-shelf.com/stl-file-management-software.md): Category-definition page.
- [How to organize STL files](https://stl-shelf.com/how-to-organize-stl-files.md): Main problem-solving page.
- [3D print file organization](https://stl-shelf.com/3d-print-file-organization.md): Mixed-format library page.
- [Private 3D model library software](https://stl-shelf.com/private-3d-model-library-software.md): Ownership-first positioning page.
